title: Upon Adam Peapes. Epig.
content:
Peapes he does strut, and pick his teeth, as if
    His jaws had tir'd on some large chine of beef.
    But nothing so: the dinner Adam had,
    Was cheese full ripe with tears, with bread as sad.
meaning:
"Upon Adam Peapes. Epig." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
